name: Receipts
description: Generates local proof-of-work receipts from OpenClaw agent completion events.

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: Choose which OpenClaw agent completions should generate receipts.

workspaceDir.label: Workspace Directory
workspaceDir.help: Optional fixed directory where .receipts artifacts should be written. Defaults to the agent turn workspace.

receiptsBin.label: Receipts CLI
receiptsBin.help: Optional path to receipts CLI executable. Defaults to this package's bin/receipts.js.
